subcodes.first_line: The peerless Lord maketh mention of His loved ones who dwell in Azghand, that all may attain unto perfect sanctification and detachment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خداوند بیمانند احبای خود را که در ازغند ساکنند ذکر میفرماید تا کل بکمال تقدیس و تنزیه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
